name: FAAST Education
location: 13-C Ali Tower, Jaranwala Road, Near RCG Plaza, Faisalabad, Pakistan
description: FAAST Education is a premier educational institution in Faisalabad dedicated to providing advanced coaching and entry test preparation for students of all levels. We specialize in MDCAT, NUST NET, NUMS, NTS, LUMS, FUNG and evening coaching programs with a focus on delivering quality education with personalized attention.

announcement.title: New Admissions Open
announcement.message: Enroll now for the upcoming batch. For LAT

programs.name: Evening Coaching
programs.tagline: Academic Excellence for School & College Students
programs.description: Comprehensive evening coaching programs designed for Matric and Intermediate students. Our experienced faculty provides focused, personalized coaching to help students excel in their board exams with strong conceptual understanding.
details: Matric (9th & 10th) all subjects coaching
Intermediate (FSc Pre-Medical & Pre-Engineering) coaching
Experienced subject specialists for each subject
Regular tests and detailed performance reports
Doubt-clearing sessions after every class
Past papers and exam strategy workshops
Monthly position holders recognized and rewarded
Flexible batch timings (4 PM – 9 PM)

programs.name: Entry Test Preparation
programs.description: A comprehensive crash course designed to prepare students for all major university entry tests in Pakistan. Covering full syllabi with targeted practice, mock tests, and expert guidance to ensure maximum scores.
details: Complete syllabus coverage for all entry tests
Subject-wise intensive sessions (Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Maths, English)
Daily practice questions and weekly mock tests
Entry test strategy and time management training
Analysis of past 10 years' papers
One-on-one doubt sessions with faculty
Score improvement guarantee
Small batch sizes for maximum attention

programs.name: NET Sessions (NUST)
programs.tagline: Pakistan's Top Engineering University Entry Test
programs.description: Specialized preparation for NUST Entry Test (NET) — one of Pakistan's most competitive engineering entrance exams. Our NET program covers all subjects with NUST-specific question patterns, MCQ strategies and extensive mock testing.
details: Full coverage of NUST NET syllabus (Physics, Chemistry, Maths, English, IQ)
NUST-pattern MCQs from verified past papers
Subject-wise intensive sessions by NUST alumni coaches
Weekly NUST mock tests with score analysis
IQ and analytical reasoning special sessions
NET 1, NET 2, NET 3 preparation strategy
Guidance on NUST campus selection and merit lists
Interview and aggregate score calculation guidance
programs.university: NUST - National University of Sciences & Technology

programs.name: MDCAT Preparation
programs.description: Comprehensive MDCAT preparation covering the full PMC syllabus. Our dedicated medical faculty helps aspiring doctors build strong conceptual foundations in Biology, Chemistry, Physics, and English to achieve top MDCAT scores.
details: Full PMC-approved MDCAT syllabus coverage
Chapter-wise Biology, Chemistry, Physics, and English sessions
PMC-pattern daily practice MCQs (3,600+ questions)
Full-length MDCAT mock tests every Sunday
Detailed result analysis and weak area targeting
Special Biology and Chemistry intensive boot camps
Past MDCAT papers (2019–2024) fully solved
Guidance on aggregate calculation and merit estimation
Enrollment support for government medical colleges

programs.name: NUMS Preparation
programs.description: Targeted preparation for NUMS entry test for admission to Army Medical Colleges across Pakistan. Covers the full NUMS syllabus with special focus on Biology, Chemistry, Physics and English in the NUMS-specific MCQ format.
details: Full NUMS entry test syllabus coverage
NUMS-specific Biology, Chemistry, Physics, English preparation
NUMS past papers analysis and practice
Weekly full-length NUMS mock tests
AMC (Army Medical College) merit and admission guidance
Special focus on NUMS-unique question patterns
Score analysis and performance improvement tracking
Guidance on NUMS test centers and registration
programs.university: NUMS - National University of Medical Sciences

programs.name: FUNG (FAST-NUCES)
programs.description: Specialized preparation for FAST-NUCES (NU) entry test. FUNG is one of Pakistan's top Computer Science universities. Our program covers Mathematics, English, and IQ/Analytical sections with FAST-specific practice.
details: Full FUNG syllabus: Mathematics, IQ, English
FAST-NUCES past papers and pattern analysis
Advanced Mathematics problem-solving sessions
IQ, logical reasoning and verbal ability training
Weekly FUNG mock tests with full analysis
Guidance on FAST Faisalabad campus admission
CS/IT program selection and career counseling
Aggregate calculation and merit estimation support
programs.university: FAST-NUCES - Foundation for Advancement of Science & Technology

programs.name: NTS Preparation
programs.tagline: National Testing Service — All Tests Covered
programs.description: Comprehensive preparation for all NTS-based tests including NAT (National Aptitude Test) and GAT (Graduate Assessment Test). Covers all subject areas including verbal, quantitative, and analytical reasoning sections.
details: NAT-I (for undergraduate admissions) full preparation
NAT-II (for postgraduate admissions) full preparation
GAT-General and GAT-Subject preparation
Verbal, Quantitative and Analytical Reasoning mastery
NTS past papers (10+ years) practice and analysis
Time management and MCQ-solving strategies
Weekly NTS full-length mock tests
Registration guidance and test center information

programs.name: LUMS Preparation
programs.tagline: Pakistan's Ivy League — LUMS Entry Test
programs.description: Exclusive preparation for LUMS (Lahore University of Management Sciences) entry test — one of Pakistan's most prestigious and competitive admissions. Covers SAT-style reasoning, Mathematics and English at an advanced level.
details: LUMS SSE and SDSB entry test full preparation
SAT-style Mathematics (advanced algebra, calculus basics)
Critical Reading and English comprehension mastery
Logical Reasoning and analytical thinking sessions
LUMS past test papers and model papers practice
Essay writing and interview preparation support
Merit estimation and scholarship guidance
Small, elite batch sizes for individual attention
programs.university: LUMS - Lahore University of Management Sciences

features: Personalized attention with small batch sizes
Regular tests, mock exams & performance tracking
Affordable fee structure with easy installments
Proven track record of top results
